shared_case_surface: bounded lineage cases that keep cluster_ref, reviewed candidate_ref, staged seed_ref, optional downstream object_ref, terminal branch markers, and owner-shaping context inspectable on the same structural lineage surface
bounded_replacement_rule: A local repo may replace the concrete cases only if it preserves the same lineage-integrity question, keeps stage order and stage-gate prerequisites jointly inspectable, and still covers clean forward continuity, dropped visibility, superseded replacement traceability, and missing-stage failure without collapsing the bundle into owner-fit or final object quality review.
public_safe_requirements: a bounded outside reviewer can inspect stage order without private owner-local context
dropped and superseded paths remain visible enough to review honestly
owner-shaping context stays visible without being inflated into owner proof
the public readout stays weaker than later owner and final object proof
